title: Refresh certificate
description: Refresh the existing cert on reader

command.description: The value for the key command must be set_refreshCertificate

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

name.description: Certificate name. For REST, the certificate is identified by the certname path parameter; for MQTT, the certificate is identified by the name payload field.

type.description: Certificate type. Allowed values: client, server, app.
